zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian ferch Dafydd於大約1288年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Dafydd28歲，母親female24歲。她和Dafydd ap Einion至少有8個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian ferch Dafydd于大约1288年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Dafydd28岁，母亲female24岁。她和Dafydd ap Einion至少有8个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian ferch Dafydd was born about 1288, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Dafydd, was 28 and her mother, female, was 24. She had at least 8 sons and 3 daughters with Dafydd ap Einion.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian ferch Dafydd est née environ 1288, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Dafydd, avait 28 ans et sa mère, female, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles avec Dafydd ap Einion.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian ferch Dafydd um 1288 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dafydd 28 und ihre Mutter female 24. Sie hatte mit Dafydd ap Einion mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Dafydd è nata il circa 1288 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Dafydd, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, female, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie con Dafydd ap Einion.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Dafyddが約1288年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Dafyddは28歳，母femaleは24歳であった。彼女はDafydd ap Einionとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian ferch Dafydd(이)가 대략 1288년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dafydd(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 female(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Dafydd ap Einion(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian ferch Dafydd nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Dafydd, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, female, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas com Dafydd ap Einion.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian ferch Dafydd родилась около 1288 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Dafydd было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали female, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери от Dafydd ap Einion.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian ferch Dafydd nació aproximadamente 1288, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Dafydd, tenía 28 años y su mamá, female, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas con Dafydd ap Einion.
